chat.uploadRequiredForInpaint: 🎨 Please upload an image first to use Inpaint!
chat.faceSwapGuide: 📷 Image 1 = Body (Target) / 🧑 Image 2 = Face (Source) — Drag to swap
chat.faceSwapNoImage: Please upload at least 2 images for Face to Face mode.
chat.inpaintClothingHint:
Paint over clothing to remove. The AI will generate natural skin underneath.
• Images with more skin exposure have a higher success rate.
• For images with extensive clothing, repeating the process multiple times increases the success rate.
• ⚠️ Using high-quality images increases the success rate.

img2imgConsent.term0: I am 18 years of age or older.

firstGenModal.title: Before You Start Generating
firstGenModal.privacyPoint1: • Prompts entered are not used for AI model training.
firstGenModal.privacyPoint2: • Anonymized statistical analysis may be performed to improve filtering accuracy.
firstGenModal.privacyPoint3: • Generated images are automatically deleted after 1 hour.
firstGenModal.privacyCheck: I have reviewed and agree to the data handling policy.
firstGenModal.compliancePoint1:
All images on this service are 100% AI-generated.
No real individuals are depicted in any generated content.
firstGenModal.complianceCheck: I have read and acknowledged the statement above.
